notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist. Deferred transparency QA (2026-05-08): alpha-sensitive candidate is RGB/no real alpha in probe samples; cleanup is required before review or integration gates can reopen.
final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: mastery card icon set for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate icon sheet for six elemental mastery card icons. Subject: six ornate card-like mastery emblems in a 3x2 sheet: fire mastery flame sigil, ice mastery crystal sigil, earth mastery leaf/stone sigil, heart mastery healing sigil, armor mastery shield sigil, gold mastery coin/crown sigil. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy game icons, premium card/relic feel, crisp mobile readability. Composition/framing: 3x2 sheet, equal-size emblems, centered, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels. Lighting/mood: magical and collectible, stronger prestige than basic orb icons. Color palette: element colors plus antique gold frames and dark backing. Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, avoid tiny detail.
